overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic Asian-inspired urban district. The player traverses an elevated walkway lined with red lanterns and neon signs, descends through a tiled stairwell, and emerges into a sunlit plaza with distinctive cyberpunk architecture featuring holographic billboards and elevated transit tracks.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with overhead transit track

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated walkway observing the surrounding cityscape and neon signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the railing

entered.detail: green painted metal safety railings lining both sides of the walkway
traditional red paper lanterns hanging from overhead wires along the right side
tall teal-colored modern building with multiple windows and rooftop signage
elevated monorail or transit track structure running above the street
multi-story red building featuring glowing neon heart-shaped signs on the facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway in a futuristic city, with green railings and traditional red paper lanterns lining the path. The teal highrise and red building with neon hearts dominate the left side while an overhead transit track is visible in the distance. The player walks forward passing a pedestrian moving in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway approaching commercial building entrance

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing forward along the curved walkway

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated path passing various storefronts and approaching a building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a purple jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall yellow residential building with multiple balconies and windows
massive digital billboard displaying animated advertisements on a building facade
green neon arrow sign pointing left mounted on the building wall

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the elevated walkway, the teal highrise passes out of view as a yellow apartment block and large holographic billboard come into focus ahead. The player follows a pedestrian in a purple jacket while making a slight right turn, approaching a building entrance with a green neon arrow sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor stairwell and corridor with digital advertisements

events.description: enters doorway transitioning from outdoor elevated walkway to indoor stairwell
approaching corridor exit with increasing natural light visible at the end

agents.ego_description: descending concrete stairs through a narrow tiled corridor toward ground level

entered.detail: narrow stairwell with white ceramic tile walls and concrete steps descending downward
illuminated digital screen displaying product advertisements on the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The player enters a doorway leaving the bright exterior behind, transitioning into a narrow white-tiled stairwell with artificial lighting. Descending the concrete stairs past digital advertisement screens, the corridor gradually brightens as the exit to the outside becomes visible at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza at ground level with transit overpass

events.description: exits covered corridor into open sunlit plaza with ground-level city streets

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the street level with neon signs and buildings visible ahead

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench wearing a pink top

entered.detail: wide open paved plaza area at ground level with geometric tile patterns
low concrete seating benches arranged along the left side of the plaza
massive concrete highway overpass structure with multiple lanes visible above
the same red building with neon heart signs now viewed from ground level straight ahead

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a wide urban plaza at ground level. Concrete benches line the left side where a person sits, while the red building with neon hearts stands prominently ahead. An elevated highway overpass spans the right side of the frame as the player walks toward the street crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along an elevated urban walkway that shifts from a lantern-lit path toward a dense cluster of holographic advertisements. It begins by gliding past green railings and traditional red paper lanterns, with a teal highrise and a building adorned with neon hearts framing the left side of the view. As the camera moves forward and passes a pedestrian, the teal architecture recedes to make way for a yellow apartment block and a towering holographic billboard. The scene then shifts as the camera follows a person in a purple jacket, making a slight right turn that leads toward a building entrance marked by a glowing green neon arrow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed interior into a bright, expansive urban plaza. It begins as the camera passes through a doorway, leaving the exterior light behind to enter a narrow, white-tiled stairwell illuminated by artificial lighting and digital advertisement screens. As the camera descends the concrete stairs, the corridor gradually brightens, drawing the viewer toward a visible exit at the far end. The scene then opens abruptly into the glare of midday sunlight, revealing a wide ground-level plaza featuring concrete benches and a prominent red building adorned with neon hearts. Finally, the camera moves toward a street crossing, passing under the heavy shadow of an elevated highway overpass that spans the right side of the frame.
